A.evidence: Faithful prose with proper ## heading hierarchy, figure captions, and reference anchors preserved; display eqns as LaTeX with \tag{1}/\tag{2} and inline $\mathcal{H}(\mathbf{x})$; only nits: authors merged onto one line and '8*×*deeper' italic artifact. C.evidence: Cleanest prose, merges paragraphs across page breaks; excellent LaTeX inline math and display eqns with \tag{1}/\tag{2}; but section titles are plain lines ('Abstract','1. Introduction') not markdown headings and figure captions are dropped. Excerpt ends before any table.

D.evidence: Equations (1) and (2) lost as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' and inline math flattened; reading-order error drops author 'Jian Sun' from the header and floats it into the middle of page 2; word-merge 'Wehypothesize' and curly-to-straight quote damage ('levels').
